articles.title: BOC to offer 4 seized Discaya vehicles for negotiated sale on April 30
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Bureau of Customs (BOC) said Friday that four luxury vehicles seized from contractor couple Pacifico “Curlee” and Cezarah “Sarah” Discaya will be offered for negotiated sale after failing to sell in previous public auctions. In an advisory, the BOC said that the negotiated sale will be held next Thursday, April 30. A public viewing of the cars at the Port of Manila is scheduled from April 27-29. The BOC noted that the following cars will be put up for negotiated sale: The BOC earlier said that the agency will resort to negotiated sale or “direct offer” [...]...
